tl.name: scgeo.tl.align_vectors
tl.signature: (adata, vec_key: 'str', ref_vec_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, *, ref_from_shift: 'bool' = False, shift_store_key: 'str' = 'scgeo', shift_kind: 'str' = 'shift', shift_level: 'str' = 'global', shift_index_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, obs_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_align', store_key: 'str' = 'scgeo') -> 'None'
tl.doc: Cosine alignment between vectors.

tl.signature: (adata, *, alignment_key: 'str', group1: 'str' = 'discordant', group2: 'str' = 'aligned', subset_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, subset_values: 'Optional[Sequence[str]]' = None, layer: 'Optional[str]' = None, method: 'str' = 'wilcoxon', pts: 'bool' = True, min_cells: 'int' = 20, key_added: 'str' = 'alignment_driver_genes') -> 'pd.DataFrame'
tl.doc: Identify genes associated with alignment or discordance between geometric shift

tl.signature: (adata, *, node_key: 'str', condition_key: 'str', group0: 'Any', group1: 'Any', basis: 'str' = 'umap', velocity_basis: 'Optional[str]' = None, ood_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, ood_groupby: 'Optional[str]' = None, robustness: 'Optional[pd.DataFrame]' = None, min_cells: 'int' = 10, store_key: 'str' = 'shift', overwrite: 'bool' = True)
tl.doc: High-level ScGeo analysis orchestrator.

tl.doc: Compute consensus subspace directions from multiple delta vectors (sample-aware if sample_key is given).

tl.signature: (adata, rep: 'str' = 'X_umap', condition_key: 'str' = 'condition', group1: 'Any' = None, group0: 'Any' = None, *, by: 'Optional[str]' = None, k: 'int' = 30, eval_on: 'str' = 'union', store_key: 'str' = 'scgeo') -> 'None'
tl.doc: Compute density overlap between two conditions on an embedding using kNN density estimates.

tl.signature: (adata, rep: 'str' = 'X_pca', condition_key: 'str' = 'condition', group1: 'Any' = None, group0: 'Any' = None, *, sample_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, by: 'Optional[str]' = None, method: 'str' = 'energy', n_perm: 'int' = 500, seed: 'int' = 0, store_key: 'str' = 'scgeo') -> 'None'
tl.doc: Distribution difference test with sample-aware permutation.

tl.doc: Quantify local-geometry preservation across latent representations.

tl.signature: (adata, *, ref_key: 'str', ref_value: 'str', label_key: 'str', query_key: 'Optional[str]' = None, query_value: 'Optional[str]' = None, graph_key: 'str' = 'connectivities', conf_method: 'str' = 'entropy_margin', ood_method: 'str' = 'connectivity_mass', reject_conf: 'Optional[float]' = None, reject_ood: 'Optional[float]' = None, rep: 'Optional[str]' = None, store_key: 'str' = 'map_query_to_ref', pred_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_pred', conf_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_conf', conf_entropy_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_conf_entropy', conf_margin_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_conf_margin', ood_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_ood', reject_key: 'str' = 'scgeo_reject', return_probs: 'bool' = False, probs_key: 'str' = 'X_map_probs', label_order_key: 'str' = 'map_label_order') -> 'None'
